title: physalis integrifolia
intro: Physalis integrifolia, also known as the New Zealand ground cherry, is a small shrub native to New Zealand. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and its antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Physalis integrifolia include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Physalis integrifolia can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a popular choice for natural remedies in traditional medicine.
